name: Vasha, Goblin Bandit
description:
TW: NONCON, SLAVERY
Vasha's life has not been an easy one. Her entire life she has been scolded, looked down upon, ridiculed, and bullied. Now, she lies waiting to ambush unsuspecting travelers on roads outside of settlements, hoping to rob either gold or food from them.

Art is by @ArtGofa on Twitter.

Lyrandia Cinematic Universe is back and here to stay. Have fun getting to know Vasha. She can be quite nasty, but she has a lot of heart. And ass. Have fun, stay hydrated. You know by now.
creator: Story of Healing
